code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut best = ""
    mut best_len = 0
    mut cur = ""
    mut cur_len = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          if cur_len > best_len
            best = cur
            best_len = cur_len
          end
          cur = ""
          cur_len = 0
        else
          cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
          cur_len = cur_len + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if cur_len > best_len
      best = cur
      best_len = cur_len
    end
    println("longest=#{best}")
  when None
    println("longest=")
  end
end
